productDisplayName: Nike Men Solid Navy Blue Sweatshirts
description: CompositionBlack hooded sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, hoodie with drawstring, ribbed panels on the sides, patch pocket on the waist with double sided opening, embroidered swoosh logo on the upper left chest and a ribbed hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not dry cleanDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm iron onlyDo not iron on print or embroideryThis black hooded sweatshirt from nike is inspired by classic street style staples. The ribbed panels on the sides add discreet styling, while the thick fabric along with the hoodie gives extra insulation. Team this with tees and jeans.
